package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for request_id_generation_duplicated_outside_middleware: Repeated request-id creation logic spread across handlers.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule142NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule142NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule142NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario142Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule142NegativeService, input Rule142NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
